title: [MTR4] JR East E235 Series | JR東日本E235系
description: JR East E235 Series for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
The E235 series is a narrow-gauge DC electric multiple unit (EMU) operating on the JR East network in the Greater Tokyo area. The train was introduced on the Yamanote Line in 2015, progressively replacing the E231-500 series trains. An outer-suburban variant, the E235-1000 series, was introduced on the Yokosuka and Sobu Rapid Lines in 2020 to replace the E217 series trains and are equipped with bilevel green cars and onboard toilets.

This resource pack adds the E235 series to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, with custom model and textures.

Both E235-0 and E235-1000 variants are included in this pack.

There are four types of cars for each variant and you may configure them as you wish.

- Cab forwards
- Trailer
- Pantograph trailer
- Cab backwards
